name: agentkvt-production-logs
description: Analyze live AgentKVT production logs over SSH from the repo-local production host.

interface.shortDescription: Pull and summarize live production logs
interface.longDescription: Use the repo-local production log analyzer to inspect the live AgentKVT app, Rails API, Postgres, and launchd logs on the production SSH host and summarize the latest failures.
defaultPrompt: Analyze current AgentKVT production logs on familyagent@192.168.4.144
Pull raw production log excerpts and summarize the latest failures
Check whether the AgentKVT production stack is healthy
